title: Michigan kids miss a lot of school. Rural districts trying to change that
summary_en: Michigan has the highest rate of chronic absenteeism in the Midwest. In rural southwest Michigan, districts are using research-backed tactics to get kids in class.
author: Julie J. Riddle, New/Nueva Opinion
title_cn: Michigan kids miss a lot of school. Rural districts trying to change that

title: As Michigan falls further behind, some ask: Time to overhaul high school?
summary_en: With college readiness low and absenteeism high, education groups say Michigan is overdue for a change in high school graduation standards
author: Isabel Lohman
title_cn: 密歇根州高中教育发展滞后 各方呼吁对高中教育体系实施全面改革
